mainlineSource.reason: Example platform backbone for SEO admin, state management, publish sync, and deployment-trigger workflow.

sites.label: 示範品牌站
notes: Example runtime brand connector with topic backlog and publish cadence controls.
Useful as the first onboarding sample for a Cloudflare-native SEO site.

sites.label: 示範在地服務站
notes: Example local-intent connector for restaurants, clinics, shops, and service businesses.
Shows how a second runtime site can share most connector logic while using its own topic seeds.

sites.label: 示範工具站
notes: Example programmatic SEO connector backed by D1 structured overrides.
Useful for calculator pages, glossaries, landing-page clusters, and other entity-driven routes.

sites.label: 示範平台站
notes: Example build-sync platform that publishes content through a public feed and syncs at build time.
Use this pattern when the SEO control plane should trigger downstream Pages or GitHub-based deployments.

sites.label: 示範即時平台站
notes: Example runtime platform that serves product pages and SEO pages from the same Worker.
Also acts as a workflow-module donor so audit, draft, ranking, and repair flows can be reused by other sites.
